en.extract:
The pied cuckooshrike (Coracina bicolor) is a species of bird in the family Campephagidae.
It is endemic to Indonesia, where it is found in Sulawesi. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical mangrove forest.
It is threatened by habitat loss.

The '''pied cuckooshrike''' ('''''Coracina bicolor''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Campephagidae]].
It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to [[Indonesia]], where it is found in [[Sulawesi]]. Its natural [[habitat]]s are [[subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest]] and subtropical or tropical [[mangrove forest]].
It is threatened by [[habitat loss]].
[[File:Pied Cuckoo-Shrike - Sulawesi MG 3737 (16840607700).jpg|thumb]]

zh.extract:
双色鹃鵙（学名：Coracina bicolor）是山椒鸟科鸦鹃鵙属的一种。为印度尼西亚的特有种。其自然栖息地为亚热带或热带的湿润低地森林以及亚热带或热带的红树林。该物种因栖息地减少而受到威胁。
种名 bicolor 意为“二色的”。


参考文献
BirdLife International. Coracina bicolor. The IUCN Red List of Threatened Species 2009.   [2010-10-04] （英语）.
